channel.title: Codeigniter on King Ulee
channel.description: Recent content in Codeigniter on King Ulee

item.title: Implementation of SMKN 34 Jakarta Online Examination System
item.author: youremail@example.com (King Ulee)
item.description: SMKN 34 Jakarta, which is located at Jl. Kramat Raya No. 93, Central Jakarta, is a vocational high school (SMK) with an A accreditation in engineering. Established in 1972, this school has graduated many skilled professionals and has a strong track record of channeling its graduates into leading manufacturing and engineering industries.
